summary: Initial full-stack testing of VitalIQ. Backend: 16/17 pytest cases passed (94.1%); the one failing assertion was a budget-driven fallback in AI insights, NOT a code bug — Claude integration is verified working end-to-end (backend log shows 'AI insights generated via Claude' and UI screenshot shows rich Claude-authored trend_summary referencing actual BP 120/80, HR 65-68, weight delta, hydration target). Frontend: all 5 tabs navigate, dashboard renders ring + 6 stat cards, log forms save with banner confirmation, profile edits persist across reloads, insights generate flow updates score from 62 -> 72 with category bars and suggestions, history screen reachable from dashboard.

minor.issue: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY hit budget cap on repeated calls during tests: 'litellm.BadRequestError: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.010299, Max budget: 0.001'. Code falls back correctly. First call of the session succeeded with real Claude. Main agent / platform owner needs to raise budget on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for sustained AI-insights usage.

issues: Repeated React warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking but should be migrated.

react_native_issues.issue: tabBarTestID is not propagated to web DOM by Expo Router (tab-home/tab-workout/... selectors don't exist as data-testid). Tab navigation still works via visible text labels. Cosmetic — does not affect real-device testing; only test selector fidelity on web preview.

action_items: Increase / refresh EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget so subsequent /api/insights/generate calls don't fall back. Insights code itself is correct.
(Optional) Replace deprecated pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents to remove console warnings.
(Optional) For nicer web e2e selectors, wrap tab labels with a View having testID; current tabBarTestID is RN-only.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~630 lines — borderline. Consider splitting into routers/ (profile, logs, insights) before adding more endpoints.
/api/profile PUT accepts arbitrary Dict[str, Any] without Pydantic validation; could allow polluting the document with unexpected fields. Consider a ProfileUpdate model.
Insights call_ai uses 12000-char snapshot slice — fine for now but may truncate JSON mid-record. Consider trimming list lengths instead of string-slicing JSON.
seed_data_creation: Tests inserted weight/bp/hr/meal/water/sleep/med/workout records and profile updates under user_id='default'. UI flow added 2 more weight logs and 1 sleep log. Test rows are tagged with TEST_ prefix where applicable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints verified except sustained AI insights (budget-limited). Use single insights generate call per session to avoid the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget cap, or have main agent rotate/refresh the key. Tab navigation in playwright requires text-based selectors (Home/Workout/Log/Insights/Profile) because Expo Router does not project tabBarTestID to web DOM. Correct generate-insights testID is 'generate-insight-btn' (singular). EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is correctly wired and used by api.ts.
rca_of_issue: AI insights fallback RCA: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY has a 0.001 budget cap and was exceeded after first successful Claude call (each call ~0.005). The backend handles this correctly by returning used_fallback=true. Reproduction: POST /api/insights/generate twice in quick succession -> second call returns used_fallback=true. Mitigation: rotate or raise budget on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (or accept fallback for testing). No code change required.
